documentation.description:
---------------------------------------------------------------------
  pt-colors -- Some pre-defined colors
  Copyright (C) 2021, 2023, 2024, 2025 Stephane Carrez
  Written by Stephane Carrez (Stephane.Carrez@gmail.com)
  SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
---------------------------------------------------------------------

simple_types.name: Distance
simple_types.code: type Distance is delta 0.0001 range 0.0 .. 3.0 with Small => 0.0001;

simple_types.name: Grayscale
simple_types.code: type Grayscale is delta 0.001 range 0.0 .. 1.0 with Small => 0.0001;

simple_types.name: HSV_Index
simple_types.code: type HSV_Index is new Natural range 16 .. 255;

simple_types.name: Hue
simple_types.code: type Hue is delta 0.001 range 0.0 .. 360.0 with Small => 0.0001;

simple_types.name: Light
simple_types.code: type Light is delta 0.0001 range 0.0 .. 1.0 with Small => 0.0001;

simple_types.name: Saturation
simple_types.code: type Saturation is delta 0.0001 range 0.0 .. 1.0  with Small => 0.0001;

simple_types.name: Value
simple_types.code: type Value is delta 0.0001 range 0.0 .. 1.0 with Small => 0.0001;

array_types.name: HSV_Array
array_types.code: type HSV_Array is array (HSV_Index) of HSV;

record_types.name: HSV

constants.name: Black
constants.code: Black   : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => 0, Green => 0, Blue => 0);

constants.name: Blue
constants.code: Blue    : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => 0, Green => 0, Blue => MID);

constants.name: Cyan
constants.code: Cyan    : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => 0, Green => MID, Blue => MID);

constants.name: DARK
constants.code: DARK    : constant Color_Level := Color_Level'Last / 4;

constants.name: Dark_Blue
constants.code: Dark_Blue    : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => 0, Green => 0, Blue => DARK);

constants.name: Dark_Cyan
constants.code: Dark_Cyan    : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => 0, Green => DARK, Blue => DARK);

constants.name: Dark_Green
constants.code: Dark_Green   : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => 0, Green => DARK, Blue => 0);

constants.name: Dark_Grey
constants.code: Dark_Grey    : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => DARK, Green => DARK, Blue => DARK);

constants.name: Dark_Magenta
constants.code: Dark_Magenta : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => DARK, Green => 0, Blue => DARK);

constants.name: Dark_Red
constants.code: Dark_Red     : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => DARK, Green => 0, Blue => 0);

constants.name: Dark_Yellow
constants.code: Dark_Yellow  : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => DARK, Green => DARK, Blue => 0);

constants.name: Green
constants.code: Green   : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => 0, Green => MID, Blue => 0);

constants.name: Grey
constants.code: Grey    : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => MID, Green => MID, Blue => MID);

constants.name: Light_Blue
constants.code: Light_Blue    : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => 0, Green => 0, Blue => MAX);

constants.name: Light_Cyan
constants.code: Light_Cyan    : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => 0, Green => MAX, Blue => MAX);

constants.name: Light_Green
constants.code: Light_Green   : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => 0, Green => MAX, Blue => 0);

constants.name: Light_Magenta
constants.code: Light_Magenta : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => MAX, Green => 0, Blue => MAX);

constants.name: Light_Red
constants.code: Light_Red     : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => MAX, Green => 0, Blue => 0);

constants.name: Light_Yellow
constants.code: Light_Yellow  : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => MAX, Green => MAX, Blue => 0);

constants.name: Magenta
constants.code: Magenta : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => MID, Green => 0, Blue => MID);

constants.name: MAX
constants.code: MAX     : constant Color_Level := Color_Level'Last;

constants.name: MID
constants.code: MID     : constant Color_Level := Color_Level'Last / 2;

constants.name: Red
constants.code: Red     : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => MID, Green => 0, Blue => 0);

constants.name: White
constants.code: White         : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => MAX, Green => MAX, Blue => MAX);

constants.name: Xterm_Grayscale
constants.code: Xterm_Grayscale   : constant HSV_Index := 231;

constants.name: Xterm_HSV_Palette
constants.code: Xterm_HSV_Palette : constant HSV_Array;

constants.name: Yellow
constants.code: Yellow  : constant Color_Type := (Alpha => MAX, Red => MID, Green => MID, Blue => 0);

subprograms.name: Color_Distance
subprograms.code: function Color_Distance (First, Second : in HSV) return Distance

subprograms.name: Max_Level
subprograms.code: function Max_Level (Color : in Color_Type) return Color_Level

subprograms.name: Min_Level
subprograms.code: function Min_Level (Color : in Color_Type) return Color_Level

subprograms.name: To_Color
subprograms.code: function To_Color (H : Hue; S : Saturation; V : Value) return Color_Type

subprograms.name: To_Gray_Palette
subprograms.code: function To_Gray_Palette (Color : in Color_Type) return HSV_Index

subprograms.name: To_Grayscale
subprograms.code: function To_Grayscale (Color : in Color_Type) return Grayscale

subprograms.name: To_HSV
subprograms.code: function To_HSV (Color : in Color_Type) return HSV

subprograms.name: To_Palette
subprograms.code: function To_Palette (Color : in Color_Type) return HSV_Index
